title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at ISS Facility Services India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at ISS Facility Services India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ISS Facility Services India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ISS Facility Services India:
ISS Facility Services India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
